## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Edge 124]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15]
- Screen size: [e.g. Desktop 1920x1080, Mobile]
- Theme: [Light / Dark / System]
